title: Chain.java - Apache Hadoop MapReduce Chain Class
description: Chain.java in Apache Hadoop MapReduce defines a Chain class, managing multiple mappers and a single reducer. It ensures compatibility between mappers, handling input/output via blocking queues or task contexts. The class manages threads for mappers and reducer, using ChainRecordReader and ChainRecordWriter. It supports adding mappers that read from input context, write to a queue, or read from a queue and write to output context. The runMapper and runReducer methods execute mappers and reducers, while startAllThreads, joinAllThreads, and interruptAllThreads manage thread lifecycle. The class creates and manages a chain of Mappers and a single Reducer, prioritizing chain configuration over individual Mapper or Reducer settings.

It supports adding mappers that read from input context, write to a queue, or read from a queue and write to output context.
